candidate_definition_hints.text: Once upon a time, an [unsuspecting Mozilla engineer](http://calculist.org) created an API in Firefox that exposed the SpiderMonkey engine's JavaScript parser as a JavaScript API. Said engineer [documented the format it produced](https://web.archive.org/web/20210314002546/https:/…
